changePwd.title: Beddel eraygaaga sirta ah
changePwd.current: Furaha sirta ah ee hadda jira
changePwd.confirm: Ku celi erayga sirta ah ee cusub
changePwd.success: ✓ Furaha sirta ah waa la beddelay
changePwd.errMismatch: Furaha sirta ah ee cusub isma waafaqsana
changePwd.errSameAsOld: Furaha sirta ah ee cusub wuxuu la mid yahay kii hore
changePwd.errWrongCurrent: Furaha sirta ah ee hadda jira waa khaldan yahay
changePwd.errNoPassword: Beddelka erayga sirta ah looma heli karo akoonkan (gelitaan Google ah).
changePwd.errSuperAdmin: Furaha sirta ah ee super-admin waxaa lagu dejiyaa habaynta server-ka.

sip.title: Telefoonka SIP
sip.subtitle: Dejinta SIP Trunks ee wicitaanada soo socda iyo kuwa baxaya
sip.passwordChangeLabel: Fure cusub (ka tag meel bannaan si aan loo beddelin)

incoming.heading: Wicitaanada soo socda ee SIP
incoming.lead: Cinwaan SIP gaar ah oo loogu talagalay gudbinta wicitaanada dibadda ee ka imanaya bixiyahaaga nidaamka VibeVox.
incoming.emptyTitle: Cinwaanka SIP ee soo socda lama abuurin
incoming.emptyHint: Samee SIP URI gaar ah + login/furaha sirta ah si macaamiishu ay kaaga soo wici karaan taleefan kasta, VibeVox-na si toos ah ayuu codkaaga u turjumi doonaa waqtiga dhabta ah.
incoming.create: Samee cinwaan SIP ah wicitaanada soo socda
incoming.active: Wicitaanada soo socda waa la helayaa.
incoming.paused: Cinwaanka SIP waa la sameeyay, soo dhawaynta waa la hakiyay
incoming.activeHint: Turjubaanka Bridge wuxuu dhegeystaa qolka. Wicitaan kasta waxaa loo turjumaa waqtiga dhabta ah.
incoming.pausedHint: Dhaqaaji soo dhawaynta si VibeVox u bilowdo turjumaadda wicitaanada soo socda.
incoming.createdToast: Cinwaanka SIP ee soo socda ayaa la sameeyay
incoming.deletedToast: Cinwaanka SIP ee soo socda waa la tirtiray
incoming.toggleFailed: Ku guuldareystay inuu beddelo soo dhaweynta

outbound.heading: Wicitaan baxaya
outbound.lead: Ka wac lambarka taleefanka shabakadda internetka, VibeVox si toos ah ayuu u turjumi doonaa wadahadalkaaga waqtiga dhabta ah.
outbound.noTrunkTitle: Marka hore, samee SIP Trunk baxaya
outbound.noTrunkHint: Buuxi foomka "New SIP Trunk" ee ku yaal xagga sare ee bogga - VibeVox waxay isticmaali doontaa bixiyahaaga SIP (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk, FreePBX) wicitaanada baxaya.
outbound.configureFirst: Marka hore, samee SIP Trunk baxaya (foomka kore)
outbound.invalidNumber: Fadlan geli lambarka saxda ah qaabka caalamiga ah (+XXXXXXXXXXXX)

howTo.heading: Sida loo dejiyo
howTo.step1: Ka hel aqoonsiga SIP Trunk ee bixiyahaaga (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step2: Ku qor foomka kore oo keydso.
howTo.step3: VibeVox waxay si otomaatig ah u abuuri doontaa SIP Trunk baxaya oo ku jira LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: Dhawaan soo socda: URI-ga SIP ee soo socda ee loogu talagalay gudbinta wicitaanada dibadda.

toasts.saved: Dejinta SIP Trunk ayaa la keydiyay
toasts.saveFailed: Ku guuldareysatay in la badbaadiyo SIP Trunk
toasts.deleteFailed: Ku guuldareysatay in la tirtiro SIP Trunk
toasts.loadFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la raro dejimaha SIP: {{error}}

tenantOnly.title: SIP Trunks waxaa loo qaabeeyey heerka kiraystaha
tenantOnly.hint1: Taleefanka SIP laguma habeyn karo akoon superadmin ah (haddii uusan jirin UUID kireyste).
tenantOnly.hint2: Soo gal sida isticmaale caadi ah oo leh tenantId u gaar ah si uu u abuuro SIP Trunk.

sip.connected: SIP Trunk waa la keydiyay oo la isku waafajiyay LiveKit

danger.deleteTrunkHint: Qaabeynta waa la tirtiri doonaa. Wicitaanada baxaya way joogsan doonaan ilaa aad dib u abuurto SIP Trunk.
danger.deleteInbound: Ka saar cinwaanka SIP wicitaanada soo socda
danger.deleteInboundHint: LiveKit inbound trunk iyo dispatch rule waa la tirtiri doonaa. Wicitaanada soo socda mar dambe lama heli doono.
danger.reissueHint: Dib u soo saar login iyo erayga sirta ah ee cinwaanka SIP. Macluumaadkii hore ma sii shaqeyn doono.

outbound2.rateInfo: Kharashka daqiiqaddii wicitaanka baxaya waxaa go'aamiya bixiyahaaga SIP.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: Ficilkan lama soo celin karo. Marka la tirtiro, wicitaanada baxaya way joogsan doonaan ilaa la sameeyo SIP Trunk cusub.
confirm.deleteInboundTitle: Ka saar cinwaanka SIP si aad u soo gasho?
confirm.deleteInboundBody: Ficilkan lama celin karo. Inbound trunk + dispatch rule ee LiveKit Cloud waa la tirtiri doonaa.

page.title: Dejinta Enterprise
page.subtitle: Dhammaan isku-darka, furayaasha, iyo xuduudaha AI ee akoonkaaga
page.upsellTitle: Qaybtan waxaa laga heli karaa qorshaha Enterprise.
page.upsellBody: Halkan waxaad ku habeyn kartaa: furaha Gemini API shaqsiyeed, prompt iyo saldhig aqoon, is-dhexgal bot Quest Flow + Telegram, iyo ku xidhitaanka Chatwoot CRM.

common.lastCheck: Markii ugu dambeysay ee la hubiyay: {{when}}
common.savedPlaceholder: La keydiyay (geli cusub si aad u beddesho)

apiKey.savedPlaceholder: La keydiyay (geli cusub si aad u beddesho)

gemini.heading: Furaha Google Gemini API
gemini.lead: Fure shaqsiyeed oo ka socda AI Studio. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa halkii laga isticmaali lahaa kan caalamiga ah dhammaan wicitaanada Gemini ee akoonkaaga.
gemini.leadSuffix: Waxaa loo isticmaalaa halkii laga isticmaali lahaa kan caalamiga ah dhammaan wicitaanada Gemini ee akoonkaaga.
gemini.lastCheckLabel: Markii ugu dambeysay ee la hubiyay: {{when}}
gemini.successSavedValidated: Furaha waa la keydiyay waana la xaqiijiyay - way shaqeysaa.
gemini.successValid: Furuhu waa ansax - Gemini API waa la heli karaa.
gemini.successInvalid: Furuhu waa mid aan sax ahayn: {{error}}
gemini.confirmDeleteTitle: Ka saar furaha Gemini ee kireystaha kasta?
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: Hawlaha AI waxay isticmaali doonaan furaha la wadaago ee VibeVox (haddii la habeeyey).

telegram.heading: Telegram-bot si aad u hesho ogeysiisyo
telegram.lead: Samee bot adigoo isticmaalaya @BotFather oo geli calaamaddiisa. Qof kasta oo fariin u dira bot-kan/start wuxuu heli doonaa ogeysiisyo: macaamiil cusub, calaamado, khaladaad is-dhexgal. Waxaad iska diiwaan gelin kartaa shaqaale badan ama waxaad ku dari kartaa bot-ka koox ama kanaal—ogeysiisyada waxaa si toos ah loogu diri doonaa qof walba.
telegram.leadAllWhoStart: Qof kasta oo wax u qora bot-kan
telegram.leadAfterStart: , wuxuu heli doonaa ogeysiisyo ku saabsan macaamiil cusub, calaamadaha, iyo khaladaadka isdhexgalka. Waxaad iska diiwaan gelin kartaa shaqaale badan ama waxaad ku dari kartaa bot-ka koox ama kanaal - qof walba si toos ah ayuu ogeysiiska u heli doonaa.
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} waa la keydiyay. Salaan ayaa loo diray macaamiisha {{sent}}.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ Bot @{{username}} waa la keydiyay. Qof kasta oo fariin u soo dira /start wuxuu heli doonaa ogeysiisyo.
telegram.successTestSingle: ✓ Farriin ayaa la soo diray. Hubi Telegram.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ Farriin ayaa loo diray dadka qaata {{count}}. Fadlan ka eeg Telegram.
telegram.testTooltip: Ku dir ogeysiis tijaabo ah bot
telegram.confirmUnlinkBody: Macaamiisha ayaa sidoo kale laga saari doonaa - ogeysiisyada way joogsan doonaan.
telegram.lastBroadcast: Boostada ugu dambeysay: waxaa la keenay {{sent}} laga bilaabo {{total}}

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Keydi oo hubi furaha API-ga marka hore — abuurista sawirku waxay u baahan tahay.
imageModel.hint: Nano Banana waxay samaysaa wax soo saar, tafatir iyo hal-abuur. Imagen waxay ka soo saartaa oo keliya xoq.

prompt.heading: Talooyin
prompt.subtitle: Prompt iyo aqoon ku salaysan qoraalka qolalka fiidiyowga oo keliya
prompt.showDefault: Waa maxay AI-ga caadiga ah u isticmaalo?
prompt.appendNote: Waxaad ku dari kartaa xeerarkaaga gaarka ah - waxaa lagu dari doonaa kuwa caadiga ah.
prompt.headerLeadBold1: kaliya si loo furo fariimaha qolalka fiidiyowga
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - marka aad gujiso farriin ku jirta sheeko-xariireed oo aad doorato cod
prompt.contextLeadPart1: Waxaa la isticmaalaa marka aad gujiso fariin ku jirta sheekaysiga qolka fiidiyowga oo aad doorato cod
prompt.contextLeadPart2: Saldhigga aqoonta ayaa sidoo kale lagu dhex daray (hoos).
prompt.defaultSummary: Waxa AI uu si caadi ah u isticmaalo (haddii goobtaadu madhan tahay) - dhagsii si aad u aragto
prompt.extendNoteText: oo leh xeerar/qaab/erey u gaar ah - waxaa lagu dari doonaa prompt-ka caadiga ah ee kor ku xusan iyo saldhigga aqoonta.
prompt.errLoadSettings: Ku guuldareystay in la raro dejimaha
prompt.kbHeading: Saldhigga Aqoonta — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Soo geli dukumeenti—katalog, FAQ, liiska qiimaha, xeerarka, ama agabka tilmaamaha. Mawduuca waxaa lagu falanqeeyaa server-ka (Word/Excel/CSV → qoraal) waxaana isku dara AI marka ay fariimaha ku qorayso qolalka fiidiyowga. Xadka: 50 MB fayl / 500,000 xaraf oo ku jira xogta.
prompt.kbPreviewSummary: Hordhac (500 oo xaraf ee ugu horreeya)
prompt.successFileUploaded: Faylka "{{filename}}" ({{format}}) waa la soo raray - xarfo {{kbLength}} ayaa la keydiyay.
prompt.errLoadFile: Ku guuldareystay in la soo galiyo faylka
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: Dhammaan dukumeentiyada la soo galiyay way baaba'ayaan. Tallaabadan lama celin karo.
prompt.presetsHeading: Codadka sharraxaadaha ee la heli karo
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: Wada sheekaysiga Qolka Ganacsiga, waxaad iftiimin kartaa fariin kasta oo aad weydiisan kartaa AI inay ku sharaxdo codka la doortay.
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: wuxuu adeegsadaa prompt-kaaga laga soo qaatay goobta kore.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Jawaabaha AI ee macaamiisha iyada oo loo marayo Telegram-bots iyo Inbound API
questFlow.warning: Haddii goobtu madhan tahay, waxaa la isticmaalayaa prompt-ka guud ee VibeVox.
questFlow.headerLead: Wadahadalka AI ee macmiil kasta si gaar ah iyada oo loo marayo Telegram-bot ah oo ku xiran Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysLead: Fure kasta waa sir aad ku geliso baloogga Quest Flow HTTP ee silsilad. VibeVox waxay u isticmaashaa inay aqoonsato akoonkaaga. Waxaad u abuuri kartaa furayaal badan silsilado kala duwan.
questFlow.keyLabelPlaceholder: Calaamadda (ikhtiyaar), tusaale ahaan: "Bot-ka wax soo saarka ee rugta caafimaadka"
questFlow.createdWarning: ⚠ Keydso furaha - waxaa la tusayaa hal mar oo keliya
questFlow.noKeysHint: Furayaal weli ma jiraan. Samee kii ugu horreeyay.
questFlow.confirmRevokeBody: Quest Flow wuu joojin doonaa inuu ka shaqeeyo.
questFlow.promptLead1: Waxay go'aamisaa SIDA AI ula xiriirto macaamiisha iyada oo loo marayo Quest Flow: codka, qaabka, waxa la aqoonsan karo.
questFlow.promptLead2: - prompt-ka guud ee VibeVox ayaa la isticmaalay (hoos).
questFlow.promptLead3: - waxaa lagu dari doonaa prompt-ka aasaasiga ah iyo saldhigga aqoonta.
questFlow.defaultSummary: Waxa AI uu si caadi ah u isticmaalo (haddii goobtaadu madhan tahay) - dhagsii si aad u aragto
questFlow.successPromptSaved: Prompt-ka Quest Flow ayaa la keydiyay.
questFlow.kbLead1: Dukumentiyada - buugga adeegga, liiska qiimaha, FAQ. Soo rar TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — AI-gu ma heli doono xaqiiqooyin shirkadeed; waxay ku jawaabi doontaa oo keliya iyadoo lagu saleynayo aqoon guud.
questFlow.kbLead3: Laga soo bilaabo qaybta "Tilmaamaha"—si aad u hesho qoraal muuqaal ah. Xadka: 50 MB fayl / 500,000 xaraf oo ku jira xogta.
questFlow.successFileUploaded: Faylka "{{filename}}" waa la soo raray ({{kbLength}} xaraf).
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: Saldhigga aqoonta ee Quest Flow waa la nadiifin doonaa. Tallaabadan lama tirtiri karo.
questFlow.tagsLead: AI wuxuu calaamadahan u qoondeeyaa macaamiisha haddii uu ogaado in wadahadalku isku mid yahay. Calaamadaha waxaa lagu soo bandhigayaa kaarka qolka macmiilka waxaana loo gudbinayaa CRM (Qaybta 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: Furaha si joogto ah ayaa loo tirtiri doonaa. Quest Flow wuxuu joojin doonaa shaqada isagoo isticmaalaya - waxaad u baahan doontaa inaad abuurto fure cusub oo aad ku beddesho silsiladda.

chatwoot.heading: Isdhexgalka CRM (Chatwoot)
chatwoot.subtitle: Si toos ah ugu dir taariikhda wicitaanka iyo calaamadaha Chatwoot.
chatwoot.headerLead: Waxay u wareejinaysaa taariikhda wadahadalka iyo calaamadaha baahida macaamiisha Chatwoot CRM
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Agent Access Token (laga bilaabo Profile → Access Token)
chatwoot.testSuccess: Xiriirku wuu shaqeynayaa - Chatwoot ayaa ka jawaabaya.
chatwoot.successSaved: La keydiyay. Hadda dhagsii "Tijaabi Xidhiidhka" si aad u hubiso.
chatwoot.errLoad: Ku guuldareystay in la raro dejimaha
chatwoot.whatSentItem1: Xiriirka macmiilka (by telegram_user_id, oo leh custom_attributes)
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Wadahadal leh qoraal gaar ah = taariikh wadahadal oo dhammaystiran
chatwoot.whatSentItem3Prefix: Dhammaan calaamadaha loo qoondeeyay ee baahiyaha ku jira
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Waxaa la diraa marka aad gacanta ku gujiso "U dir CRM" sheekada qolka. Dirista otomaatiga ah marka la ogaado calaamadaha ayaa ah astaanta xigta.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: Ficilkan lama celin karo. Qoraalka iyo warbaahinta ku lifaaqan waa la tirtiri doonaa.
chat.deleteMessageConfirmMediaNote: Faylka jireed sidoo kale waa laga tirtiri doonaa server-ka.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: Qolalka sheekaysiga waa astaamo Enterprise. Ku cusboonaysii qorshahaaga qaybta "Qorshayaasha".
chat.deleteFailed: Ku guuldareystay in la tirtiro farriinta
chat.empty: Wali wax fariimo ah kuma jiraan sheekaysigan.

insights.title: Falanqaynta wadahadalka
insights.tooShort: Wadahadalku aad buu u gaaban yahay si loo falanqeeyo.

lobby.title: Ku biirista kulan fiidiyow ah
lobby.subtitle: Wicitaan fiidiyoow ah oo leh turjumaad AI isku mar ah
lobby.languageHint: Waxaad maqli doontaa oo arki doontaa qoraallo kooban oo ka socda qofka aad la hadlayso luqaddaas.
lobby.shareHint: Nuqul ka samee oo u dir qofka aad la hadlayso si uu ugu martiqaado kulan.
lobby.audioConsent: , iyo sidoo kale ogolaanshaha habaynta maqalka si loogu turjumo.
lobby.roomFullMsg: Waxaa horey uga qayb galay shirka. La xiriir abuuraha shirka ama codso mid cusub.
lobby.shareSuccessHint: ✓ Xiriiriyaha waa la koobiyeeyay. U dir qofka aad la xiriirayso Telegram / WhatsApp / Email. Waad xiri kartaa bogga hadda - xiriirku had iyo jeer wuu shaqeeyaa.
lobby.overloadedMsg: Too many translations are running right now. Wait a minute and try again — a slot will free up and you'll get in.

paywall.titleNoSub: Si aad qol u abuurto, fadlan iska diiwaan geli qorshe
paywall.titleLowBalance: Daqiiqado kama harsan yihiin dheelitirkaaga - iska diiwaan geli qorshe ama wax badan iibso
paywall.subtitle: Dooro qorshe ama iibso daqiiqado dheeraad ah - ku bixi Stripe, isla markiiba halkan ku soo celi.
paywall.topupNote: Daqiiqado ayaa lagu dari doonaa dheelitirkaaga isla marka aad bixiso lacagta.
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ Ma lihid rukun firfircoon. Waxaa lagu dari doonaa iibsigaaga Plus €19/bishii—60 daqiiqo ayaa ku jira qorshahaaga, markaa ma jirto wax kharash dheeraad ah.
paywall.topupPlusLine: Qiimo Plus ({{count}} daq ayaa ku jirta)
paywall.topupFreeLine: ↳ {{count}} daq bilaash ah oo leh qorshe
paywall.stripeNote: Lacag bixinta waxaa ilaaliya Stripe. Daqiiqadaha waxaa si toos ah loogu shubaa lacagta ka dib marka la bixiyo.

postCallInsights.title: Falanqaynta Wadahadalka
postCallInsights.subtitle: Enterprise · aragtiyo wicitaan kadib
postCallInsights.close: Xidh oo ku soo noqo qolalka

billingPage.title: Qorshayaasha iyo lacag bixinta
billingPage.subtitle: Dhammaan sifooyinka VibeVox - dooro qorshe ku habboon xawaaraha shaqadaada.
billingPage.cancelAutoRenewQuestion: Jooji dib-u-cusboonaysiinta otomaatiga ah ee rukunkaaga?
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Jooji cusboonaysiinta otomaatiga ah. Rukunkaagu wuxuu ahaan doonaa mid firfircoon ilaa dhammaadka xilliga hadda jira.
billingPage.canceled: Rukunka la joojiyay waxaa loo calaamadeeyay
billingPage.resumeAutoRenewQuestion: Dib u bilaabista cusboonaysiinta otomaatiga ah ee rukunka?
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: Lacagta xigta waxay dhici doontaa dhammaadka xilliga hadda jira.
billingPage.resumeTooltip: Dib u cusboonaysiinta otomaatiga ah ee rukunka.
billingPage.resumed: Rukunka dib ayaa loo soo celiyay
billingPage.promoHint: Qiimo dhimista si toos ah ayaa loo isticmaali doonaa marka aad iska diiwaangeliso qorshe ama aad iibsato daqiiqado dheeraad ah.
billingPage.checkoutFailed: Ku guuldareystay inuu furo lacag bixinta: {{error}}
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: Daqiiqadaha ayaa laga soo gudbay xilligii hore. Marka hore waa la isticmaalay.
billingPage.topupHelp: Slider iibsi oo dheeraad ah. Waxaa laga heli karaa rukun firfircoon.
billingPage.tierPlusSummary: Wadahadallada gaarka loo leeyahay iyo kuwa madaxa-bannaan
billingPage.tierEnterpriseSummary: Xirmo buuxda oo AI ah oo loogu talagalay ganacsiga
billingPage.featureLiveSubs: Cinwaan-hoosaadyo qoraal ah oo waqtiga-dhabta ah
billingPage.featureSip: Telefoonka SIP (soo galaya iyo kuwa baxaya)
billingPage.featureLearnHub: Xarunta Waxbarashada AI — lahjadaha u gaarka ah
billingPage.featureCRM: Kaararka macaamiisha oo leh aqoonsi otomaatig ah
billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Salaan! Waxaan xiiseynayaa qorshaha Enterprise VibeVox.
billingPage.searchLanguagesPlaceholder: Soo hel luqaddaada - tusaale ahaan, "Boortuqiis", "boortuqiis", ru
billingPage.faqQ1: Maxaa ku dhacaya daqiiqadaha aan la isticmaalin?
billingPage.faqA1: Daqiiqadaha aan la isticmaalin waxay u gudbaan bisha xigta ee kalandarka. Waxay dhacayaan bisha saddexaad.
billingPage.faqQ2: Ma joojin karaa rukunkayga wakhti kasta?
billingPage.faqA2: Haa. Ku jooji akoonkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed hal guji. Muddada hore loo bixiyay waxay sii socotaa ilaa dhammaadka.
billingPage.faqA3: Xirmooyin AI oo buuxa: kaararka macaamiisha oo leh aqoonsi otomaatig ah, Telegram-oggolaanshaha, prompt-ka shaqsiyeed, Google Calendar, calaamadaynta baahiyaha caqliga leh, dhoofinta CRM, is-dhexgalka questflow.pro, iyo tab maamul oo gaar ah.
billingPage.faqQ4: Bixiyaha taleefanka ee SIP kee baad u baahan tahay?
billingPage.faqA4: Qof kasta oo u hoggaansan RFC: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, iwm. VibeVox wuxuu si toos ah u sameeyaa outbound trunk.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 daqiiqaddii. Laga bilaabo 60 daqiiqo ilaa 10 saacadood. Isla markiiba waa la amaahiyaa ka dib bixinta.
billingPage.discountWithPromo: qiimo dhimis ah -{{percent}}% oo leh koodhka dallacaadda {{code}}
billingPage.cancelDetailActiveUntil: Rukunku wuxuu ahaan doonaa mid firfircoon ilaa {{date}}.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Daqiiqadaha qiimaha ayaa la heli karaa ilaa taariikhdan; daqiiqado dheeraad ah ayaa la iibsan karaa.
billingPage.cancelDetailAutoClose: Kadib, rukhsadda ayaa si toos ah u xidhmi doonta.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHeading: Cusboonaysiinta otomaatiga ah waa la joojiyay · rukunku wuu xidhmi doonaa {{date}}
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Daqiiqadaha qorshahaagu waa ansax ilaa taariikhdan; waxaad iibsan kartaa kuwo dheeraad ah. Guji "Dib u bilow" haddii aad beddesho go'aankaaga.
billingPage.yearlySavings: Keydso €59 sannadkii (2 bilood oo bilaash ah)
billingPage.languagesLead: Liis dhammaystiran oo luqado ah oo ay taageerayaan turjumaad isku mar ah oo waqtiga-dhabta ah. Ogaanshaha luqadda isha ee otomaatiga ah - ka qaybgale kastaa wuxuu doortaa luqaddiisa hooyo.
billingPage.languagesNoResults: Luqadda laguma helin liiska kuwa la taageeray.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Isku day higgaad kale—tusaale ahaan, Ingiriisi ama alifbeetada maxalliga ah. Haddii luuqaddu ay hubaal tahay inay maqan tahay, noo sheeg, waana ku dari doonnaa.

seo.title: VibeVox - Turjumaadda AI-waqtiga-dhabta ah ee wicitaanada fiidiyowga iyo SIP
seo.description: VibeVox waa madal turjumaad cod oo isku mar ku shaqeysa AI oo taageerta in ka badan 100 luqadood. Wicitaanada fiidiyowga, taleefanka SIP, sheekaysiga macaamiisha, iyo falanqaynta wadahadalka ee AI ku shaqeeya ayaa diyaar ah.
seo.keywords: Turjumaadda AI, turjumaad isku mar ah, wicitaanno fiidiyoow ah oo turjumaad leh, taleefan SIP ah, turjumaan cod ah

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: VibeVox waa turjubaan AI ah oo isku mar loogu talagalay wicitaannada codka iyo fiidiyowga ee 108 luqadood. Telefoonka WebRTC iyo SIP, kaaliyaha codka, iyo turjumaadda waqtiga-dhabta ah waxay ka shaqeeyaan aalad kasta.
pwaInstall.installCta: Ku dar VibeVox shaashadda gurigaaga—wicitaanno leh turjumaad, SIP, iyo kaaliye AI ah hal taabasho. Waxay u shaqeysaa sida abka asalka ah.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Tag shaashadda guriga - ku bilow hal taabasho
